confidenceNote: All portal data sourced from public reporting. Confirmed = official announcement or UT Athletics release. Reported = multiple public reports. No information is invented.

incoming.name: Cam Coleman
incoming.depthChartImpact: Enters as co-WR1 alongside Ryan Wingo. Creates an unsolvable two-receiver problem for SEC defenses.
incoming.playersAffectedNote: Wingo remains WR1 but Coleman's presence ensures neither can be bracketed.
incoming.projectedRole: WR1/WR2 split with Ryan Wingo. Primary deep threat and contested-catch target.
incoming.offensiveImpactNote: Arch Manning now has a true WR1-caliber threat across from Wingo. Defenses cannot bracket both.
incoming.source: Multiple public reports — On3, 247Sports, Inside Texas

incoming.name: Raleek Brown
incoming.depthChartImpact: Enters as projected RB1. Brings veteran experience and big-play ability from three years at Oklahoma State.
incoming.playersAffectedNote: Fills void at lead back. No returning RB had significant experience before his arrival.
incoming.projectedRole: Lead back. Expected to carry 15-20 times per game in Sarkisian's run-first sets.
incoming.offensiveImpactNote: Provides the featured back Texas lacked after Bijan-era depth thinned. Run game credibility restored.

incoming.name: Hollywood Smothers
incoming.depthChartImpact: Projected RB2 behind Raleek Brown. Provides speed and pass-catching ability as a change-of-pace back.
incoming.playersAffectedNote: Depth addition that gives Texas a legitimate 1-2 punch in the backfield.
incoming.projectedRole: RB2 / change-of-pace back. Pass-catching specialist out of the backfield.
incoming.offensiveImpactNote: Creates a genuine backfield rotation. Smothers in passing sets changes what defenses can do against Texas's run.

incoming.name: MJ Morris
incoming.depthChartImpact: Experienced backup behind Arch Manning. Provides proven starting-level experience in the backup role.
incoming.playersAffectedNote: Manning is clearly QB1. Morris provides the staff confidence if Manning misses time.
incoming.projectedRole: QB2. Emergency starter with proven production (1,850 yds, 16 TD at NC State in 2024).
incoming.offensiveImpactNote: Depth piece. Manning's backup situation is now one of the strongest in the SEC.

incoming.name: Emmett Mosley V
incoming.depthChartImpact: Provides depth and slot versatility behind Coleman and Wingo. Gives Sarkisian a third receiving option.
incoming.playersAffectedNote: Adds to WR depth after losing Bond, Mitchell, and Cook II to graduation/NFL.
incoming.projectedRole: Slot receiver / WR3. Slot depth and special teams contributor.
incoming.offensiveImpactNote: Depth piece. Ensures WR room has numbers after significant 2025 graduation losses.

incoming.name: Sterling Berkhalter
incoming.depthChartImpact: Senior WR depth. Veteran presence in the position room who knows SEC competition.
incoming.playersAffectedNote: Depth addition. Replaces lost graduation production at WR.
incoming.projectedRole: WR depth. Special teams contributor and veteran presence.
incoming.offensiveImpactNote: Senior depth piece. Knows SEC competition from his time at Tennessee.

incoming.name: Ty Boatright
incoming.depthChartImpact: Special teams and emergency depth. Brings familiarity with Raleek Brown from Oklahoma State.
incoming.playersAffectedNote: Roster depth. Known commodity who chose Texas for his senior year.

incoming.name: Michael Masunas
incoming.depthChartImpact: Projected starter at TE. Texas needed a proven TE after the position thinned significantly.
incoming.playersAffectedNote: Fills the TE void left by Jahleel Billingsley's departure.
incoming.projectedRole: TE1 starter. Run-blocking and pass-catching in the middle of the field.
incoming.offensiveImpactNote: Provides a viable TE option that Texas lacked in 2025. TE room is now functional.

incoming.name: Rasheem Biles
incoming.depthChartImpact: Replaces Anthony Hill Jr. (1st round pick) at linebacker. Ohio State veteran adds immediate credibility.
incoming.playersAffectedNote: Direct replacement for Anthony Hill Jr. who left early for the NFL Draft.
incoming.projectedRole: LB1 starter. Three-down linebacker who can play in coverage and in the run game.

incoming.name: Derek Williams Jr.
incoming.depthChartImpact: Projected CB1 opposite Malik Muhammad. 2025 Big Ten All-Conference selection brings proven talent.
incoming.playersAffectedNote: Williams Jr. and Muhammad form what could be one of the top CB duos in the SEC.
incoming.projectedRole: CB1 starter. Will travel with opponent's top WR.

outgoing.name: Quinn Ewers
outgoing.rosterImpact: Expected departure. Arch Manning was already the de facto starter.

outgoing.name: Johntay Cook II
outgoing.rosterImpact: WR depth loss replaced by Coleman via portal.

outgoing.name: Isaiah Bond
outgoing.rosterImpact: WR starter depth loss. Coleman arrival more than compensates.

outgoing.name: Adonai Mitchell
outgoing.rosterImpact: WR production loss. Coleman is a superior talent replacement.

outgoing.name: Anthony Hill Jr.
outgoing.rosterImpact: Significant production loss. Biles is a capable but not equivalent replacement.

outgoing.name: T'Vondre Sweat
outgoing.rosterImpact: Interior DL depth thinned. Staff relying on development from 2026 class.

outgoing.name: Jahleel Billingsley
outgoing.rosterImpact: TE starter departed. Masunas is a functional but different-style replacement.

outgoing.name: Kelvin Banks Jr.
outgoing.replacedBy: Internal development — Trevor Goosby / Jaydon Chatman
outgoing.rosterImpact: First-round OT departure. OT is now the highest-priority remaining need heading into 2026.

watchList.name: Deondre Jackson
watchList.confidenceNote: Texas in top 3 — source: public reports

watchList.name: Malaki Starks
watchList.confidenceNote: Likely stays or NFL — source: reports

WR.net: +3 net starters (Coleman +1, depth +4, lost Bond/Mitchell/Cook II)

RB.net: Brown + Smothers fill vacant lead-back role

QB.net: Morris provides veteran backup behind Manning

TE.net: Masunas fills Billingsley void at starter level

LB.net: Biles replaces Hill Jr. (1st round). Talent gap present.

CB.net: Williams Jr. adds a proven Big Ten All-Conference CB

OT.net: Banks Jr. (1st round) departed. Internal development required.
